      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html lang="en">
      <head>
      <meta charset="UTF-8">
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no, viewport-fit=cover">
      <title>PawPulse — Lost &amp; Found Pet Map | Hastings, Nebraska</title>
      <meta name="description" content="Live lost and found pet map for Hastings, Nebraska and Adams County. Report a lost pet, help reunite animals, and see pets in care at Heartland Pet Connection.">
      <meta name="theme-color" content="#2d4a35">
      <link rel="canonical" href="https://pawpulse.net">
      <!-- Open Graph -->
      <meta property="og:type" content="website">
      <meta property="og:url" content="https://pawpulse.net">
      <meta property="og:title" content="PawPulse — Lost &amp; Found Pets · Hastings, NE">
      <meta property="og:description" content="Live lost pet map for Hastings, NE. See lost pets, found animals, and shelter intake in real time.">
      <meta property="og:site_name" content="PawPulse">
      <!-- Twitter Card -->
      <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary">
      <meta name="twitter:title" content="PawPulse — Lost &amp; Found Pet Map | Hastings, Nebraska">
      <meta name="twitter:description" content="Live lost and found pet map for Hastings, Nebraska and Adams County. Report lost pets, find strays, see shelter animals.">
      <link rel="preconnect" href="https://tile.openstreetmap.org">
      <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/leaflet/1.9.4/leaflet.min.css"/>
      <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/leaflet/1.9.4/leaflet.min.js"></script>
      <!-- Firebase -->
      <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.2/firebase-app-compat.js"></script>
      <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.2/firebase-firestore-compat.js"></script>
      <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.2/firebase-auth-compat.js"></script>
      <script>
      var db = null; var auth = null;
      var USE_FIREBASE = (typeof firebase !== 'undefined') && "AIzaSyBVzQ84gSSnukH_JEmYN70ZjXqqmxsNVIw" !== "PASTE_YOUR_API_KEY";
      if (USE_FIREBASE) {
      try {
      /* Avoid duplicate-app error on hot reload */
      var _fbApp = firebase.apps.length ? firebase.apps[0] : firebase.initializeApp({
      apiKey: "AIzaSyBVzQ84gSSnukH_JEmYN70ZjXqqmxsNVIw",
      authDomain: "pawpulse-24af8.firebaseapp.com",
      projectId: "pawpulse-24af8",
      storageBucket: "pawpulse-24af8.firebasestorage.app",
      messagingSenderId: "471613221379",
      appId: "1:471613221379:web:461bb35bf7735f0dc33c36"
      });
      db = firebase.firestore();
      auth = firebase.auth();
      auth.setPersistence(firebase.auth.Auth.Persistence.LOCAL).catch(function(){});
      } catch(e) {
      console.warn('Firebase init error:', e.message);
      }
      }
      </script>
      <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
      <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..144,300;0,9..144,600;0,9..144,700;1,9..144,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
      <style>
      :root {
      --forest: #2d4a35;
      --moss: #7aac82;
      --amber: #d4843a;
      --cream: #faf5ec;
      --cream-2: #f0e8d8;
      --cream-3: #dfd0b8;
      --warm-dk: #2a1f12;
      --warm-mid: #6b5540;
      --lost-r: #c94f2a;
      --lost-lt: #f07040;
      --found-g: #3a7d44;
      --found-lt: #5caa68;
      --nav-h: 60px;
      --panel-w: 400px;
      --font-display: 'Fraunces', serif;
      --font-body: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
      }
      *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
      body{font-family:var(--font-body);background:var(--cream);color:var(--warm-dk);height:100vh;overflow:hidden;user-select:none}
      /* NAV */
      #nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:1000;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:0 10px;height:var(--nav-h);background:var(--forest);box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
      .nav-logo{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--cream);letter-spacing:-.02em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex-shrink:0}
      .nav-logo-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
      .nav-logo-sub{font-family:var(--font-body);font-size:.56rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--moss);letter-spacing:.09em;text-transform:uppercase}
      .nav-spacer{flex-shrink:0;width:4px}
      .nav-report-btn{font-family:var(--font-body);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;padding:6px 10px;border-radius:6px;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--amber);color:#fff;letter-spacing:.01em;white-space:nowrap;touch-action:manipulation}
      .nav-report-btn:hover{filter:brightness(1.1);transform:translateY(-1px)}
      #nav-tabs{display:flex;gap:2px;flex:1;min-width:0;overflow-x:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;scrollbar-width:none}
      #nav-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
      .tab-btn{font-family:var(--font-body);font-size:.65rem;font-weight:600;padding:5px 8px;border-radius:999px;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22);background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:var(--cream);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}
      .tab-btn.active{background:var(--cream);color:var(--forest);border-color:var(--cream)}
      .tab-btn:hover:not(.active){background:rgba(255,255,255,.18)}
      .tab-ops{border-color:rgba(90,180,120,.35)}
      .tab-ops.active{background:#d8f0e0;color:#1a4a28;border-color:#d8f0e0}
      .tab-admin{border-color:rgba(212,132,58,.45)}
      .tab-admin.active{background:#fde8c8;color:#7a3a00;border-color:#fde8c8}
      .nav-mode-sep{width:1px;height:22px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);flex-shrink:0;align-self:center;margin:0 2px}
      @media(max-width:700px){input,select,textarea{font-size:16px!important}.tab-btn .tab-lbl{display:none}.nav-logo-sub{display:none}.nav-report-btn .btn-lbl{display:none}}
      /* Staff badge hidden by default — only shown via JS after auth confirms */
      #staff-badge { display: none !important; }
      #staff-badge.staff-active { display: inline-flex !important; }
      #pp-banner{position:absolute;top:28px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:600;background:rgba(45,74,53,.93);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border:1px solid rgba(122,172,130,.3);border-radius:999px;padding:9px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;min-width:280px;max-width:460px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.28);pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s}@media(max-width:640px){#map-container{margin-top:60px!important}}
      @media(max-width:640px){#pp-banner{top:42px!important}}
      .banner-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--moss);box-shadow:0 0 7px var(--moss);flex-shrink:0;animation:bdot 2s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes bdot{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.5;transform:scale(.75)}}
      #banner-txt{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--cream);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;transition:opacity .35s}
      #banner-txt.fade{opacity:0}
      #banner-dot-reunion{background:#f0b840;box-shadow:0 0 8px #f0b840}
      /* Floating filter pills on map — horizontal row at bottom center */
      #map-filters{position:absolute;bottom:54px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:600;display:flex;flex-direction:row;gap:6px;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap}
      #map-filters .filter-btn{pointer-events:auto}
      .filter-btn{font-family:var(--font-body);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;padding:6px 13px;border-radius:999px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3);background:rgba(255,255,255,.88);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);color:var(--warm-mid);box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.12);touch-action:manipulation}
      .filter-btn.active.all{background:var(--amber);color:#fff;border-color:var(--amber)}
      .filter-btn.active.lost{background:var(--lost-r);color:#fff;border-color:var(--lost-r)}
      .filter-btn.active.found{background:var(--found-g);color:#fff;border-color:var(--found-g)}
      .filter-btn.active.adopt{background:#2050a0;color:#fff;border-color:#2050a0}
      .filter-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-1px)}
      /* Reunion burst rings */
      @keyframes rburst1{0%{transform:scale(.3);opacity:.9}100%{transform:scale(4);opacity:0}}
      @keyframes rburst2{0%{transform:scale(.3);opacity:.7}100%{transform:scale(6);opacity:0}}
      @keyframes rburst3{0%{transform:scale(.3);opacity:.5}100%{transform:scale(8);opacity:0}}
      .reunion-ring{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;transform-origin:center center;border:3px solid #f0b840}
      /* Mode banners */
      .mode-banner{padding:5px 14px;font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
      .mode-banner.public{background:#f0ede6;color:#6b5540;border-bottom:1px solid var(--cream-3)}
      .mode-banner.ops{background:#e8f4ec;color:#2d5a35;border-bottom:1px solid #c0ddc4}
      .mode-banner.admin{background:#fdf0e0;color:#7a4a10;border-bottom:1px solid #e8c890}
      .mode-banner-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
      /* Map legend */
      @media(max-width:640px){#map-legend{bottom:32px!important;left:8px!important;right:auto!important;flex-direction:row!important;flex-wrap:wrap!important;gap:4px 10px!important;padding:5px 8px!important;max-width:calc(100vw - 230px)}}
      #map-legend{position:absolute;bottom:24px;left:12px;z-index:600;background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);border-radius:8px;padding:6px 10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.1);border:1px solid var(--cream-3)}
      .legend-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--warm-mid);white-space:nowrap}
      .legend-pin{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
      .print-btn{font-family:var(--font-body);font-size:.74rem;font-weight:600;padding:7px 13px;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid var(--cream-3);background:var(--cream-2);color:var(--warm-mid);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;width:100%;justify-content:center;margin-top:6px}
      .print-btn:hover{border-color:var(--amber);color:var(--amber)}
      /* VIEW — position:fixed + inset, same as PublicPulse */
      .view{position:fixed;inset:var(--nav-h) 0 0 0;display:none}
      .view.active{display:flex}
      /* MAP CONTAINER — same as PublicPulse */
      #map-container{flex:1;position:relative;overflow:hidden;margin-top:22px}
      #map{width:100%;height:100%;touch-action:pan-x pan-y;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
      .leaflet-tile{filter:saturate(.82) brightness(1.02) sepia(.06)}
      .leaflet-container{background:#d4c9b0}
      .leaflet-bottom.leaflet-right{bottom:90px !important;right:12px !important}
      .leaflet-bar a{width:32px !important;height:32px !important;line-height:32px !important;font-size:18px !important}
      /* SIDE PANEL */
      #side-panel{position:absolute;top:0;right:0;bottom:0;width:var(--panel-w);max-width:100%;background:var(--cream);border-left:1px solid var(--cream-3);z-index:800;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform .32s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);box-shadow:-4px 0 24px rgba(42,31,18,.12)}
      #side-panel.open{transform:translateX(0)}
      #side-panel::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}
      #side-panel::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--cream-3);border-radius:99px}
      function closeTutorial(markDone) {
      var overlay = document.getElementById('staff-tutorial-overlay');
      if (overlay) overlay.style.display = 'none';
      if (markDone) localStorage.setItem('pp_tutorial_done', '1');
      }
      function maybeShowTutorial() {
      /* Show tutorial on first staff login if not yet seen */
      if (!localStorage.getItem('pp_tutorial_done')) {
      setTimeout(showTutorial, 800);
      }
      }
      /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
      </script>
      <!-- Adoption inquiry slide-up -->
      <div id="adopt-inquiry-panel" onclick="closeInquiryPanel(event)">
      <div id="adopt-inquiry-inner">
      <div style="font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--warm-dk);margin-bottom:4px">💬 Express Adoption Interest</div>
      <div style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--warm-mid);margin-bottom:16px" id="inq-animal-desc">We'll pass your details to the shelter to arrange a meeting.</div>
      <div class="fg"><label>Your Name</label><input type="text" id="inq-name" placeholder="Full name"></div>
      <div class="fr">
      <div class="fg" style="margin:0"><label>Phone</label><input type="tel" id="inq-phone" placeholder="(402) 555-0100"></div>
      <div class="fg" style="margin:0"><label>Email</label><input type="email" id="inq-email" placeholder="you@email.com"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="fg"><label>Message (optional)</label><textarea id="inq-msg" placeholder="Tell them about yourself, your home, other pets…" style="min-height:72px"></textarea></div>
      <div id="inq-success" style="display:none;background:#e8f4e9;border:1px solid var(--found-g);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:.84rem;color:#2d6a35;font-weight:600">✓ Interest sent! The shelter will be in touch soon.</div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px" id="inq-btns">
      <button class="adopt-ask-btn" style="flex:1;padding:12px 11px;font-size:.9rem;min-height:48px;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:rgba(0,0,0,.1);touch-action:manipulation" onclick="submitInquiry()">📬 Send Interest</button>
      <button class="sh-btn" onclick="closeInquiryPanel(null)" style="padding:11px 16px">Cancel</button>
      </div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <!-- SEO footer — local signals, minimal UI footprint -->
      <footer id="seo-footer" style="display:none;position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:1;background:rgba(42,31,18,.88);padding:2px 10px;font-size:.58rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;white-space:normal;overflow:visible;row-gap:0">
      <a href="/lost-pets-hastings-ne" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);text-decoration:none">Lost pets in Hastings</a>
      <span>·</span>
      <a href="/found-pets-hastings-ne" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);text-decoration:none">Found pets in Hastings</a>
      <span>·</span>
      <a href="/pets-in-care-hastings-ne" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);text-decoration:none">Pets in care at Heartland</a>
      <span>·</span>
      <span>Hastings, NE &amp; Adams County</span>
      </footer>
      <!-- Out-of-bounds overlay — centered on map -->
      <div id="oob-overlay" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:2000;pointer-events:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center">
      <div id="oob-msg" style="pointer-events:auto;background:rgba(42,31,18,.92);color:#fff;border-radius:14px;padding:18px 28px;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.35);max-width:280px;backdrop-filter:blur(8px)">
      <div style="font-size:1.6rem;margin-bottom:8px">📍</div>
      <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.95rem;margin-bottom:4px">Outside Adams County</div>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;opacity:.8;line-height:1.5">Please place the pin within Adams County, NE</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <!-- STAFF TUTORIAL OVERLAY -->
      <div id="staff-tutorial-overlay" style="display:none">
      <div id="staff-tutorial-card">
      <div class="st-header">
      <h2>Welcome to PawPulse Staff</h2>
      <p>Your quick walkthrough — 6 steps, 60 seconds</p>
      </div>
      <div class="st-steps" id="st-steps-container"></div>
      <div class="st-footer">
      <button class="st-btn-skip" onclick="closeTutorial(true)">Skip for now</button>
      <div class="st-progress" id="st-progress"></div>
      <button class="st-btn-primary" id="st-next-btn" onclick="tutorialNext()">Next →</button>
      </div>
      </div>
      </div>
      </body>
      </html>
